name: pdf-reader-mcp

summaryZh: 📄 The PDF intelligence layer for AI agents — Agent Document Twin, evidence-first extraction, visual crops, OCR provenance, trust reports, and benchmark-gated releases. MCP server for Claude, Cursor, VS Code, and any MCP client. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
